# Ironclad Roofing

> Premium residential and commercial roofing contractor. Licensed, insured, and backed by a lifetime workmanship warranty. Storm damage specialists who handle insurance claims end-to-end. Free inspections with no obligation.

Ironclad Roofing is a local roofing contractor serving residential and commercial customers. The company has 19+ years in business, 3,200+ roofs installed, and a 4.9-star Google rating across 284 reviews. Certifications include GAF Certified, Owens Corning, and BBB A+.

## Services

- **Residential Roof Replacement** — Full tear-off and installation in one to two days. Handles permitting start to finish. Carries GAF, Owens Corning, and CertainTeed shingle lines.
- **Storm Damage & Insurance Claims** — Inspects, photographs, and documents damage. Works directly with insurance adjusters. Most clients pay only their deductible or less.
- **Commercial Roofing** — Flat and low-slope systems (TPO, EPDM, modified bitumen, metal panel). Phased installation to minimize disruption. Multi-property contracts available.
- **Roof Inspections** — Free comprehensive inspections with photo documentation. Pre-listing, post-storm, or peace of mind.
- **Roof Repairs** — Diagnoses and fixes source issues: cracked flashing, missing shingles, persistent leaks.
- **Gutters & Protection** — Seamless gutter installation, leaf guards, and downspout systems.
- **Emergency Repairs** — Crews available for emergency call-outs and temporary weatherproofing.
- **Ventilation & Insulation** — Ridge vents, soffit vents, and attic insulation to extend roof life and reduce energy costs.

## Warranty

Every installation is backed by a lifetime workmanship warranty plus the manufacturer's material warranty (typically 30–50 years depending on shingle line).

## Contact

- Phone: (555) 000-1234
- Email: info@ironcladroofing.com
- Hours: Mon–Fri 7am–6pm, Sat 8am–2pm

## Lead Automation (Powered by Ironsight Digital)

The site is a demo built by Ironsight Digital, a web and marketing agency for contractors. It showcases a lead automation pipeline: instant SMS response on form submit, HubSpot CRM auto-population, a 5-day SMS/email follow-up sequence, and automated post-job Google review requests.

## FAQ

- **Replacement vs. repair?** Roofs over 15 years old with multiple issues (granule loss, flashing failure, decking damage) are typically better candidates for replacement.
- **Insurance coverage?** Most homeowner policies cover wind and hail damage. Ironclad assists through the full claims process.
- **How long does replacement take?** Most residential jobs complete in one to two days.
- **Warranty?** Lifetime workmanship warranty + manufacturer material warranty (30–50 years).
